steps.title: Read the constant function
steps.content: The equation $f(x)=42$ means the output is $42$ for every input $x$.

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The correct table must show $f(x)=42$ at $x=0$, $x=1$, and $x=2$. Only one table keeps the output constant at $42$. The answer is B.
